name: Currant & Oatmeal Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the first five ingredients until blended.
2. Mix together the next six ingredients and beat in until the dry ingredients are just moistened. Do not overbeat.
3. Divide the batter between 12 paper-lined muffin cups and sprinkle the tops with cinnamon sugar.
4. Bake in a 375 degree oven for about 25 minutes, or until a cake tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Cool in the pan for a few minutes, then continue cooling on a rack.
6. Yields: 12 muffins.
